title: astragalus cystosus
intro: Astragalus cystosus is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Western China and the Himalayas. It is a perennial legume species that belongs to the pea family, known for its medicinal properties and traditional use in Chinese herbal medicine. Astragalus cystosus is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which are believed to help boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve overall health. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine, although modern supplements may also be available in capsule or tablet form.
